mapper.sql: id,project_id,project_code, cer_number,sub_project_code,sub_project_id, vector_task_id,vector_task_code,plasmid_name, transform_code,sample_code,generation, plant_number,plant_date,transplant_date, vernalization_begin_date,vernalization_end_date,pollination_method, plant_status,father_info,mother_info, pollination_date,harvest_date,create_date, update_time,other_field,edit_type, species,acceptor_material,check_result,task_num, task_status
mapper.insert:
insert into cer_plant_tb(id,project_id,project_code, cer_number,sub_project_code,sub_project_id, vector_task_id,vector_task_code,plasmid_name, transform_code,sample_code,generation, plant_number,plant_date,transplant_date, vernalization_begin_date,vernalization_end_date,pollination_method, plant_status,father_info,mother_info, pollination_date,harvest_date,create_date, update_time,other_field,edit_type, species,acceptor_material,check_result,task_num,task_status) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.projectId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.cerNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.subProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.subProjectId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.vectorTaskId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.vectorTaskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.plasmidName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.transformCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.plantNumber,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.plantDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.transplantDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.vernalizationBeginDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.vernalizationEndDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.pollinationMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.plantStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.fatherInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.motherInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pollinationDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.harvestDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{item.otherField},#{item.editType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.species,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.acceptorMaterial,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.checkResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.taskStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
